title: tithymalus oblongatus
intro: Tithymalus oblongatus, also known as Euphorbia oblongata, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tithymalus oblongatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Tithymalus oblongatus is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
